39 _22 ETLGC_DGNS_CD (22) Etiologic Diagnosis Code (ICD-9 Code) CHAR 7 The ICD-9 code that indicates the etiologic problem that led to the impairment for which the patient is receiving rehabilitation (Item 21 - Impairment Group).
